utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: Required: physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical (LifeFirst Standard Plan - €100/month) and mental (LifeFirst Standard Plan - €65/month), plus add-ons and assessment details. Costs are specified. This is fully specified.
- property_coverage: Required: home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides home_content_coverage (LifeFirst Standard Coverage - €60/month) and an enhancement service with cost. The core requirement (home/contents insurance with costs) is met. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Required: travel insurance with costs. Plan lists LifeFirst Standard Plan - €50/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Required: any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists wellness programs €200/month and technology protection €40/month, with notes about inclusion. Costs provided. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Required: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides €515/month and €6,180/year. Fully specified.
Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each named product in the final coverage plan and match it exactly to the corresponding entry in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, Wellness Programs add-on, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home content, Technology Protection enhancement, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel. Map each to its listed rating number.
